simplified_strategy.ibob_overview: Initial Balance is the first 60 mins. Breakouts define the session bias.
simplified_strategy.ibob_candle_close: Valid breakout requires a candle BODY close outside the Initial Balance, not just a wick.
simplified_strategy.ibob_bubble_body_vs_wick: Wicks piercing levels with Big Trades represent absorption (reversal). Bodies closing through represent initiative (breakout).
simplified_strategy.simplified_entry_mechanical: Enter only when structural stop is clearly defined behind a High Volume Node, a Ledge, OR the origin of Initiative Big Trades.
simplified_strategy.ibob_diagonal_imbalances: Diagonal imbalances on the footprint indicate strong aggressive participation.
simplified_strategy.ibob_stop_target: Stop behind the breakout structure. Target 1.5x IB extension.
simplified_strategy.ibob_invalidation: If price closes back inside the IB after a breakout, it is a failed auction.
simplified_strategy.failed_auction_definition: A failed auction is a probe outside a known balance area that gets immediately rejected back inside.
simplified_strategy.failed_auction_variants: Can happen at IB High/Low, VAH/VAL, or previous day extremes.
simplified_strategy.absorption_vs_exhaustion: Absorption = high volume, no price movement. Exhaustion = low volume, no price movement.
simplified_strategy.ibob_no_trade_conditions: Do not trade inside the IB on a balance day.
simplified_strategy.balance_vs_imbalance: Balance = trading inside Value Area. Imbalance = trending outside Value Area.
simplified_strategy.no_trade_rules: No trade in choppy, low volume conditions.
simplified_strategy.trend_day_rules: Do not fade a trend day. Only take continuation setups.
simplified_strategy.initiative_vs_response: Initiative flow pushes price to new areas. Responsive flow pushes price back to mean.

confirmation_rules.bolle_filter: Big bubbles must support the direction of the trade.
confirmation_rules.footprint_reading: Look for stacked imbalances and unfinished auctions.
confirmation_rules.rotation_within_va: Price rotates from VAL to VAH and vice versa on balance days.
confirmation_rules.entry_failed_auction: Enter on the close of the rejection candle.
confirmation_rules.hvn_lvn: HVN acts as a magnet. LVN acts as a wall/rejection point.
confirmation_rules.institutional_activity: Follow the large lot sizes (>50 contracts).
